profile.name: Jonathan Taylor
profile.title: Multimedia Professional & AI Systems Architect
profile.about: A creative technologist specializing in AI orchestration and digital infrastructure. From underwater videography in Thailand to robotic camera data pipelines in technical field operations, I build systems that bridge the gap between complex data and cinematic storytelling.

blog.title: System Online: The AI Audit Engine
blog.content: Today marks the launch of the Feraluke AI Audit Agent. A custom-built tool designed to calculate ROI for business automation in under 60 seconds. This marks a new chapter in providing transparent, data-driven automation roadmaps for small businesses.

projects.title: Fiji Infrastructure Tracker
projects.description: A live-syncing data visualization tool developed to track infrastructure development and robotic camera mapping pipelines in real-time.
steps: Integrated GitHub API for Real-time Sync

projects.title: AI Automation Audit Agent
projects.description: An interactive sales funnel that analyzes manual workflows, calculates yearly hourly loss, and provides a technical roadmap for AI integration.

projects.title: Vision Vault
projects.description: A multimodal AI solution designed for high-volume hobby retailers. Using Gemini 1.5 Flash vision, this node instantly identifies, grades, and prices raw trading cards, comics, and miniatures via live camera feed. Beyond simple identification, the system leverages custom 'Upsell Logic' to suggest complementary inventory and set-completion items, turning a standard appraisal into a revenue-generating opportunity.
